active_namespace.semantics: Globally unused project registry namespace/revision key for clean active corrected exact-title run; actual execution time is in LINEAGE_RUN_RECEIPT.executed_at.

supplemental_namespace.semantics: Globally unused project registry namespace/revision key for actual title-first-author miss supplements; actual execution time is in native receipt.
supplemental_namespace.syntax: four longest informative title tokens plus actual surname; 6/6 across-family v3 probe.

third_variant_namespace.semantics: Globally unused project registry namespace/revision key for method_author_year searches on five two-variant misses; actual execution time is in native receipt.
